description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front features a driveway with space for two cars, a garage, and a main entrance accented by vertical wooden slats and large windows. The backyard includes a spacious wooden deck, a rectangular swimming pool, and a hot tub, all surrounded by manicured hedges and planters. Tall, slender trees line the perimeter, providing privacy and a touch of greenery. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and gray materials, with glass elements for windows and doors. The overall layout is open and inviting, with clear zones for parking, living, and recreation.
description: A modern, two-story flat-roof bungalow with a driveway, garage, large windows, and a backyard featuring a pool and deck. Surrounded by hedges and tall trees, it has a clean, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and symmetrical landscaping with tall trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the backyard pool, deck, and hot tub, as well as the row of trees along the property.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the backyard amenities, including the pool, hot tub, deck, and garden planter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage, and the full extent of the side landscaping and fencing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and rear facades
